message:
fix(node): W3C traceparent validation, epoch transition commit handling, and API hardening

middleware:
- Strict W3C traceparent parsing: validate version field (2 hex chars,
  not "ff"), trace_id (32 lowercase hex, not all zeros), span_id
  (16 lowercase hex, not all zeros), trace_flags (2 hex chars)
- New is_lower_hex(), is_valid_trace_id(), is_valid_span_id(),
  is_valid_trace_flags() validators — previously only checked lengths

epoch_transition_barrier:
- New BarrierCommitOutcome type for richer commit result reporting

epoch_transition:
- New EPOCH_TRANSITION_COMMIT_ABORTED event code for commit-phase failures
- Extended error handling for commit-phase abort scenarios

service:
- API service layer refinements

connector/mod:
- Connector module updates

lib.rs:
- Module re-export addition

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
